entries.question: What is your return policy?
entries.answer: You may return most items within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. Items must be in original condition with original packaging. Opened software and digital downloads are non-returnable.

entries.question: How long does shipping take?
entries.answer: Standard shipping takes 5–7 business days. Expedited shipping (2–3 business days) is available for an additional fee. Free standard shipping on all orders over $50.

entries.question: How do I track my order?
entries.answer: Track your order using the order ID from your confirmation email. Use check_order_status or visit our website. Tracking updates appear within 24 hours of shipment.

entries.question: What warranty do your products come with?
entries.answer: Most electronics carry a 1-year manufacturer warranty. Laptops and monitors have a 2–3 year warranty. Extended warranty plans up to 4 years can be purchased at checkout.

entries.question: What payment methods do you accept?
entries.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and TechStore Gift Cards. Buy Now Pay Later available via Klarna for orders over $100.

entries.question: Can I cancel or modify my order?
entries.answer: Orders can be cancelled or modified within 1 hour of placement while in Processing status. After that the order cannot be changed. If shipped, initiate a return once you receive it.

entries.question: How do I reset my account password?
entries.answer: Visit the login page and click Forgot Password. Enter your registered email and we will send a reset link within 5 minutes. The link expires after 24 hours.

entries.question: Do you offer price matching?
entries.answer: Yes. We match prices from authorized retailers on identical in-stock items. Submit a price match request via support ticket with a link to the competitor listing.

entries.question: How do I claim warranty service?
entries.answer: Create a support ticket describing the defect with photos. Our team reviews within 24 hours. If approved you receive a prepaid return label. We repair or replace within 7–10 business days.

entries.question: What do I do if I received a wrong or damaged item?
entries.answer: Open a HIGH priority support ticket with photos of the item and packaging within 48 hours of delivery. We will arrange a free return pickup and ship the replacement via expedited shipping at no cost.

entries.question: Do you offer student or military discounts?
entries.answer: Verified students save 10% via our Student Program (verify with .edu email). Active and veteran military receive 12% off (verify with ID.me). Discounts stack with sale prices.

entries.question: Is my personal data safe?
entries.answer: All customer data is stored with AES-256 encryption. We do not sell personal information. You may request a full data export or deletion at any time. We are GDPR and CCPA compliant.

entries.question: Do you have a physical store?
entries.answer: TechStore operates in 45+ physical locations across North America. Use our Store Locator at techstore.com/locations to find the nearest branch. Some locations offer walk-in technical support.

entries.question: How do I check my gift card balance?
entries.answer: Check your gift card balance by logging into your account and visiting My Wallet, or ask any in-store associate. Gift cards do not expire and have no monthly fees.

entries.question: Can I get gift wrapping?
entries.answer: Yes. At checkout select 'This is a gift' for a gift receipt (no prices shown) and optional gift wrapping for $5.99. A personalized message up to 150 characters is free.
